description_long: This is a modern, geometric ceiling lamp featuring a central black metal hub from which multiple slender arms radiate outward at various angles. Each arm terminates in a socket holding a large, round, clear bulb, giving the fixture a striking, starburst appearance. The lamp is suspended from a shallow, dome-shaped ceiling mount, and the arms are arranged asymmetrically, creating a dynamic, sculptural form. The bulbs are exposed, emphasizing the industrial aesthetic and maximizing light output. The overall design is minimalist, with smooth, matte black surfaces and simple spherical joints connecting the arms. This fixture would be well-suited for contemporary urban interiors, lofts, or public spaces seeking a bold lighting statement.
description: A modern, geometric ceiling lamp with multiple black metal arms radiating from a central hub, each ending in a large, exposed round bulb. The design is minimalist and industrial, with a striking starburst form.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the lamp from a slightly angled perspective, highlighting the central hub and the varying lengths and angles of the arms, with four bulbs clearly visible.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the lamp from a different angle, revealing the asymmetrical arrangement of the arms and the full spread of the bulbs, emphasizing the starburst effect.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the lamp more side-on, showing the alignment of the arms and the spherical joints, with the bulbs appearing more evenly spaced.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a profile view, accentuating the depth and three-dimensionality of the lamp, with the arms extending outward at different planes.
